name: @lenker/panel-web
description: Lenker provider panel web application for MVP v0.1

scripts.test:session: tsc --module commonjs --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --outDir ../../node_modules/.cache/panel-web-session-test src/lib/session.ts src/lib/session.test.ts && node ../../node_modules/.cache/panel-web-session-test/session.test.js
